description: Patch: guard sub-agent recursion when [workflow-state:in_progress] breadcrumbs reach a sub-agent turn (issue #237).
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(workflow): guard sub-agent recursion (issue #237). Codex `trellis-implement` / `trellis-check` sub-agents received the same `[workflow-state:in_progress]` breadcrumb as the main session and re-dispatched themselves instead of working directly. The `in_progress` workflow-state block now scopes the dispatch rule to the main session and adds an explicit sub-agent self-exemption clause; every platform's `trellis-implement` / `trellis-check` agent definition (claude / cursor / opencode / kiro / codebuddy / droid / codex / pi / gemini / qoder) gains a `Recursion Guard` section saying it is already the dispatched sub-agent and must not spawn another. Phase 2 dispatch sections in workflow.md require a one-line dispatch-prompt guard.
notes: Patch on top of 0.5.3. Run `trellis update` (no `--migrate` needed). Affects every platform whose per-turn workflow-state breadcrumb can reach sub-agent turns (Codex confirmed; risk applies more broadly).
